last_completed_round.direction_name: Tighten Grouped-Row L2 Feed In The 128x128 PTX Hot Band
last_completed_round.hypothesis: Round 46's grouped-row traversal already proved that hot-band block order was the right locality lever: median runtime dropped from 26.892288 ms to 25.677312 ms, became the new best custom run, and moved past the local CUTLASS baseline while tensor active stayed flat at 48.24 -> 48.22. The next win is likely not more raw math scheduling, but a narrower follow-on that keeps the grouped-row mapping and further improves how adjacent CTAs reuse B/A lines and feed shared memory, because dram throughput collapsed to 12.90% and lts throughput recovered to 29.45% while mio_throttle still sits at 4.67%.

notes: Completed round 47/100. Continue with node_b for round 48/100. Accepted base: 20260420_074331_bf16_gemm_v1_17a33b2 at 25.529328 ms.
